widgets_values: worst quality, inconsistent motion, blurry, jittery, distorted

---

## Flux.2 Klein 9B & LTX-Video 2 (LTXV-2)

This document lists **all required model downloads** to run **Flux.2 Klein 9B** and **LTX-Video 2** workflows locally in **ComfyUI**.

Only models that are **actually required at runtime** are listed here.

---

If you found this model helpful, please consider contributing so we can continue training more models.

https://buymeacoffee.com/nrdx

## Flux.2 Klein 9B

### Diffusion Models

Choose **one** of the following models depending on your workflow configuration:


* **Flux Klein Fast (Distill)**

  * `flux-2-klein-9b-fp8.safetensors`
    [https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9b-fp8](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9b-fp8)
    *Recommended settings: CFG ≈ 1.0, Steps: 4+*


* **Flux Klein Base (CFG-based)**

  * `flux-2-klein-base-9b-fp8.safetensors`
    [https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-base-9b-fp8](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-base-9b-fp8)
    *Recommended settings: CFG ≈ 5.0, Steps: 20 / 30 / 50*

> ⚠️ You must visit Black Forest Labs’ repository and **accept the license agreement** before downloading FP8 models.

---

### Text Encoder

* `qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors`
  [https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-klein-9B/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-klein-9B/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors)

---

### VAE

* `flux2-vae.safetensors`
  [https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors)

---

### LoRA (Optional – Head / Face Swap)

* `bfs_head_v1_flux-klein_9b_step3500_rank128.safetensors`
  [https://huggingface.co/Alissonerdx/BFS-Best-Face-Swap/blob/main/bfs_head_v1_flux-klein_9b_step3500_rank128.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Alissonerdx/BFS-Best-Face-Swap/blob/main/bfs_head_v1_flux-klein_9b_step3500_rank128.safetensors)

---

### Flux Model Storage Layout

```
ComfyUI/
└── models/
    ├── diffusion_models/
    │   └── flux-2-klein-*.safetensors
    ├── text_encoders/
    │   └── qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors
    ├── vae/
    │   └── flux2-vae.safetensors
    └── loras/
        └── bfs_head_v1_flux-klein_9b_step3500_rank128.safetensors
```

---

## LTX-Video 2 (LTXV-2)

### Diffusion Model (Transformer Only)

Choose **one**:

* **Dev version**

  * `ltx-2-19b-dev-fp8_transformer_only.safetensors`
    [https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/blob/main/diffusion_models/ltx-2-19b-dev-fp8_transformer_only.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/blob/main/diffusion_models/ltx-2-19b-dev-fp8_transformer_only.safetensors)

* **Distilled version (recommended for most users)**

  * `ltx-2-19b-distilled-fp8_transformer_only.safetensors`
    [https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/blob/main/diffusion_models/ltx-2-19b-distilled-fp8_transformer_only.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/blob/main/diffusion_models/ltx-2-19b-distilled-fp8_transformer_only.safetensors)

---

### Text Encoders

* `gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors`
  [https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors)

* Embeddings connector
  *(must match the transformer variant you downloaded)*

  * `ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_dev_bf16.safetensors`
    [https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/blob/main/text_encoders/ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_dev_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/blob/main/text_encoders/ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_dev_bf16.safetensors)

### VAE (Required)

* **Video VAE**

---

### LoRAs

* Base LTX LoRA (choose one):

  * `ltx-2-19b-distilled-lora_resized_dynamic_fro09_avg_rank_175_bf16.safetensors`
    [https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/blob/main/loras/ltx-2-19b-distilled-lora_resized_dynamic_fro09_avg_rank_175_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/blob/main/loras/ltx-2-19b-distilled-lora_resized_dynamic_fro09_avg_rank_175_bf16.safetensors)

  * `ltx-2-19b-distilled-lora-resized_dynamic_fro095_avg_rank_242_bf16.safetensors`
    [https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/blob/main/loras/ltx-2-19b-distilled-lora-resized_dynamic_fro095_avg_rank_242_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/blob/main/loras/ltx-2-19b-distilled-lora-resized_dynamic_fro095_avg_rank_242_bf16.safetensors)

* Head Swap IC LoRA (optional):

  * `bfs_head_swap_v1_ltx2_ic_lora_6000.safetensors`
    [https://huggingface.co/Alissonerdx/BFS-Best-Face-Swap/blob/main/bfs_head_swap_v1_ltx2_ic_lora_6000.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Alissonerdx/BFS-Best-Face-Swap/blob/main/bfs_head_swap_v1_ltx2_ic_lora_6000.safetensors)

  * `bfs_head_swap_v1_ltx2_ic_lora_5000.safetensors`
    [https://huggingface.co/Alissonerdx/BFS-Best-Face-Swap/blob/main/bfs_head_swap_v1_ltx2_ic_lora_5000.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Alissonerdx/BFS-Best-Face-Swap/blob/main/bfs_head_swap_v1_ltx2_ic_lora_5000.safetensors)

---

### Latent Upscaler (Optional but Recommended)

* `ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors`
  [https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2/resolve/main/ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2/resolve/main/ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors)

---

---

### Mel-Band RoFormer (diffusion-models)

Audio Conditioning Model (Optional)

Required only if audio conditioning is enabled.

* `MelBandRoformer_fp32.safetensors`  [https://huggingface.co/Kijai/MelBandRoFormer_comfy/resolve/main/MelBandRoformer_fp32.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/MelBandRoFormer_comfy/resolve/main/MelBandRoformer_fp32.safetensors)

---

### LTX-Video 2 Model Storage Layout

```
ComfyUI/
└── models/
    ├── diffusion_models/
    │   ├── ltx-2-19b-*-fp8_transformer_only.safetensors
    │   └── MelBandRoformer_fp32.safetensors
    ├── text_encoders/
    │   ├── gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors
    │   └── ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_dev_bf16.safetensors
    ├── vae/
    │   ├── LTX2_video_vae_bf16.safetensors
    │   └── LTX2_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors
    ├── loras/
    │   ├── ltx-2-19b-distilled-lora_*.safetensors
    │   └── bfs_head_swap_v1_ltx2_ic_lora_*.safetensors
    └── latent_upscale_models/
        └── ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors
```

---

## Notes

* Always keep **ComfyUI updated** before running LTX-2 workflows.
* Some models are **nightly-only** and may not be included in stable releases yet.
* Ensure VRAM availability before loading FP8 transformer models.

nodes.title: First Pass Head Swap Result (with noise)
Distill lora (Only if using DEV model)

widgets_values: You can select which frame will be the first by adjusting the `skip_first_frames` parameter.
the frame in which the person's face is visible

You can replace that swap with qwen image edit 2511 if you want, the big issue is that it will consume more VRAM but the result tends to be better, or you can simply switch to flux klein 9b distill without quantization which will give a better result than fp8.
Here you will notice that the first frame must be the new frame with the head swap applied.

It is important to clarify that when training an IC LoRA, you cannot use audio conditioning. While standard LoRAs support this, the official IC LoRA training script does not. It is only possible if you manually modify the code. Therefore, any mouth movement you see during inference without audio conditioning is just the model attempting to mimic the lip-sync from the guide video. If you enable audio conditioning using the MelBandRoformer, the results will be significantly better, and it allows you to use any custom audio. These nodes are located in the yellow group in the workflow—simply connect them in place of the 'Empty Audio Latent' node."

A few things to keep in mind for the best results: The final quality depends heavily on the precision of your initial head swap on Frame 0. The model isn't perfect, and you might notice the original hair from the guide video bleeding back in some cases—this happens because the guide video still holds a stronger influence over the generation than the anchor frame.

**Experimental Tips & Trial (Not strict recommendations):**
The final output is a matter of personal preference and extensive testing. You may want to **try** experimenting with the LoRA strength: while 1.0 is the baseline, increasing it can help capture more head and hair details, though it might cause the model to deviate from the guide video's original motion. 

One strategy you could **experiment** with is a multi-pass approach: keeping the LoRA at 1.0 for the first pass to secure the motion, and then testing it at a higher strength in a second pass for identity refinement. Additionally, you could **try** using the **'Basic Scheduler'** instead of the default **'LTXV Scheduler'**. The Basic Scheduler allows you to manually control the **denoise** level, which is useful in multi-pass workflows to maintain more of the structure from your first video pass while the LoRA polishes the face. It’s all about trial and error to see what yields the best result for your specific case.

groups.title: Audio - Download MelBandfomer model and load it here.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: head_swap: start with Picture 1 as the base image, keeping its lighting, environment, and background. remove the head from Picture 1 completely and replace it with the head from Picture 2, strictly preserving the hair, eye color, nose structure of Picture 2. copy the direction of the eye, head rotation, micro expressions from Picture 1, high quality, sharp details, 4k.

widgets_values: bad quality, noise, blurry, worst quality, low resolution, blur, distortion, unnatural blending, cartoon, illustration, painting
